archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (adapted for Fintech/Trading)
vibe: Professional, fast, data-dense, tactical minimalism, high-contrast.

surface_styles.dashboard_card: bg-[#141414] border border-[#262626] rounded-md shadow-none hover:border-white/20 transition-colors duration-200
surface_styles.header: bg-[#0A0A0A] border-b border-[#262626] sticky top-0 z-50

components_strategy.buttons: Flat solid primary color or transparent with 1px border. Sharp or slightly rounded (max 6px).
components_strategy.tables: Shadcn Table, dense padding (py-2), text-sm, distinct border-b for rows. Zebra striping optional with bg-white/5.
components_strategy.charts: Recharts. Area charts with gradient fills (success green to transparent) for cumulative P&L. Sparklines for strategy cards.
components_strategy.forms: Shadcn Forms, Input, Select, Checkbox. Background #0A0A0A, border #262626. Focus: ring-1 ring-[#007AFF].
components_strategy.dialogs: Shadcn Dialog. Backdrop blur. Solid #141414 background.
components_strategy.tabs: Shadcn Tabs. Flat style, active tab gets border-b-2 border-[#007AFF].

image_urls.description: Abstract dark blue/geometric background for the auth pages to give a high-tech vibe.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast_ratio: Ensure text vs background meets 4.5:1. Use APCA guidelines.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: All interactive elements MUST use data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='strategy-card-1').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install the required fonts: Chivo (headings) and IBM Plex Sans (body) via Google Fonts in index.html.
Initialize Tailwind config with the specified color palette (Deep Obsidian, Volt Blue, Success Green, Danger Red).
Set global body background to #0A0A0A and text to #FFFFFF.
Do NOT use Inter, Space Grotesk, Roboto, or generic default shadcn fonts.
Follow 'Control Room' grid layout for the dashboard: dense, compact spacing, full utilization of screen estate.
Use pure HTML+Tailwind for grid skeletons, and Shadcn components for interactive bits (Tables, Select, Dialog).
Build a generic Recharts wrapper for the main Strategy performance chart and a mini Sparkline version for the Home cards.
Implement real-time sync indicator using Framer Motion (a pulsing dot in the header).
Use Italian language labels where specified in the UI, matching the problem statement requirements (e.g., cumulativo / giornaliero / settimanale / mensile).
